articles.title: MN - Gerry Cardinale present at San Siro for Milan-Juventus
articles.summary: For this evening's Milan-Juventus, a match valid for the thirty-fourth matchday of Serie A, the editorial team of MilanNews.it learns that Gerry Cardinale, founder and managing partner of RedBird, is also present at San Siro.

articles.title: VIDEO MN - The arrival of the Rossoneri bus at San Siro from above. At 8.45pm Milan-Juve
articles.summary: The AC Milan bus has just arrived at San Siro, welcomed as always by a good number of Rossoneri fans: the match against Juventus is at 8.45pm.
